text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm walking down the hall on a rainy day, when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I slip on a wet spot and stumble.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay, Big Brother?! Aaah... Of course this
would happen.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay, Big Sister?! Aaah... Of course this
would happen.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm the one who cleaned the hall today... so it's my fault you had such a close call... Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm the one who cleaned the hall today... so it's my fault you had such a close call... Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rice Shower's guilt weighs heavily on her heart.
